description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, featuring a mix of light blue and dark trim on its exterior walls. The front facade includes a covered porch with white railings, a small garden area, and a black gate, while the upper floor has a spacious balcony and two large cylindrical water tanks. The house is surrounded by a low brick wall and landscaped with various trees and shrubs, including palm trees and flowering bushes. The windows are arranged in horizontal bands, with some shaded by awnings, and the roof includes a section with a transparent or solar panel covering. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, blue exterior, balcony, and landscaped garden, featuring clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, balcony, garden, and main entry gate.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue exterior, upper balcony, and dense landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view with a flat roof, minimal windows, and palm trees along the boundary.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing water tanks on the roof, dark trim, and additional garden features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with horizontal bands and awnings
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with white railings, steps, and a black gate, accented by landscaping and a balcony above.
